settings_subtitle: Monitor WAN1 & WAN2 · Events in global log · UDM Pro / UDM SE
enabled_hint: Starts monitoring and writes WAN events into the global DOCSight event log.
host_hint: IP address or hostname of your UDM Pro (HTTPS, default port 443)
password_hint: Stored encrypted in the DOCSight configuration.
site_hint: Usually "default" unless you have multiple UniFi sites.
interval_hint: How often to check WAN status. Minimum: 15 s.
extra_ports_hint: Monitor up to two extra ports (e.g. an SFP+ port as a third WAN uplink). Enter the interface name like "eth7" and a free-form alias. Leave empty to disable.
event_failover: WAN failover: {old} → {new} is now the active uplink
